review.reason: Third-party agent skill ingestion needs stronger malicious-skill and repository-context review gates before broad growth.
review.action: Inspect license, released artifacts, defensive criteria, and whether a Risk Auditor queue item should create a durable third-party skill security checklist.

review.reason: The repository is installable; emerging Agent Skills package format may affect compatibility with Claude, GitHub, VS Code, Cursor, Goose, Amp, and OpenCode-style runtimes.
review.action: Verify official specification URL, SDK repository, license, package layout expectations, and whether Packager or Cataloger follow-up is needed.

review.reason: Benchmark evidence can help determine which software engineering skills are useful, harmful, overbroad, or version-sensitive.
review.action: Inspect README, license, task format, executable scripts, dependency behavior, and whether results can inform skill validation policy without copying benchmark content.

review.reason: Capability-tree organization, retrieval, orchestration, and benchmark structure may help catalog operations and critic checks after review gates are stronger.
review.action: Inspect README, license, benchmark data, scripts, dependency graph, and whether organization concepts can inform local catalog reports or critic checks.

catalog.reason: Normalizer added a new high-risk reviewed local skill derived from the MCP risk audit; catalog and install surfaces need rebuild/reconciliation before package or publication endorsement.
catalog.action: Run or reproduce npm run build:catalog and verify the new skill appears with high risk and requires_review metadata; reconcile with existing catalog drift item.

catalog.reason: Packager found install-facing metric drift: dist/catalog.md reports 1173 skills and 2 high-risk entries while dist/catalog.json reports 1170 skills and 1 high-risk entry.
catalog.action: Run or reproduce npm run build:catalog and reconcile all catalog/report surfaces so human-readable and machine-readable package metadata agree.
